name: Unity 28
title: Unity 28
subtitle: AAC Board
description: Unity 28 is a board set designed for users who are transitioning from single-word communication to more complex sentences. It features a core vocabulary of 28 words, including pronouns, verbs, and descriptors, allowing users to express a wide range of ideas with a small set of symbols. The board is organized in a way that promotes sentence construction and encourages the use of core words in combination with other symbols.
author: PLC
